channel.title: Building your API on Pionia
channel.description: Recent content in Building your API on Pionia

item.title: API versioning in Moonlight
item.description: One switch per API version; register in environment/settings.ini.

item.title: Moonlight overview
item.description: One versioned endpoint, real HTTP semantics, and a consistent JSON envelope.

item.title: Moonlight security model
item.description: Transport security, credential handling, and where authentication runs in the pipeline.

item.title: Services
item.description: Register TaskService on MainSwitch; each public *Action method becomes a Moonlight endpoint.

item.title: Actions
item.description: Map JSON action names to *Action methods; read Arrayable data and return response() envelopes.

item.title: Validation
item.description: Return HTTP 422 when DeskFlow clients omit required fields like task title.

item.title: Generic services
item.description: UniversalGenericService ships list, create, update, delete, and random actions out of the box.

item.title: Advanced Generic Services
item.description: Pionia Generic Services can be used for more than CRUD operations. This guide shows you how to use them.

item.title: Documenting your API (Moonlight)
item.description: Prerequisites: You have a service with *Action methods registered on a switch.
